info.title: Contact Center
info.description: The Contact Center APIs allow developers to interface with [Contact Center](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/contact-center/) features programmatically.

get.description:
Returns a list of SMS engagement logs. Engagement data are available via API once they are completed.

**[Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `contact_center_sms:master`

**[Granular Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `contact_center:read:sms_log:master`

**[Rate Limit Label](https://marketplace.zoom.us/docs/api-reference/rate-limits#rate-limits):** `HEAVY`

parameters.name: next_page_token
parameters.description: Use the next page token to paginate through large result sets. A next page token is returned whenever the set of available results exceeds the current page size. This token's expiration period is 15 minutes.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: The number of items returned per page.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: The start time and date in `yyyy-mm-dd` or ISO 8601 format, which is either `yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss'Z'` or `yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss'TZD'`. The defined date range should be a month, as the response only includes one month's worth of data. If no start date is specified, return data from the past 24 hours.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: **Required** only when the `from` parameter is specified. The end time and date in `yyyy-mm-dd` or ISO 8601 format, which is either `yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss'Z'` or `yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss'TZD'`.

parameters.name: country_iso_codes
parameters.description: Two-letter ISO country [code](/docs/api/references/abbreviations/#countries).

parameters.name: direction
parameters.description: The engagement's direction.

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: The agent's ID.

parameters.name: engagement_id
parameters.description: The engagement's ID.

parameters.name: consumer_number
parameters.description: The consumer's phone number.

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the account.

next_page_token.description: Use the next page token to paginate through large result sets. A next page token returns when the set of available results exceeds the current page size. This token's expiration period is 15 minutes.

page_size.description: The number of records returned in a single API call.

total_records.description: The total number of all the records available across pages.

from.description: The start time and date in ISO 8601 format, either `yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss'Z'`, or `yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss'TZD'`. The defined date range should be a month, as the response only includes one month's worth of data. If no start date is specified, return data from the past 24 hours.

to.description: **Required** only when the `from` parameter is specified. The end time and date in ISO 8601 format, either `yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss'Z'` or `yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss'TZD'`, the same format as the `from` parameter.

contact_center_number.description: The agent's number. An agent used a flow or queue number and did not really have its own number.

start_time.description: The date and time when the engagement started in ISO 8601 format, either `yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss'Z'` or `yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss'TZD'`.

end_time.description: The date and time when the engagement ended in ISO 8601 format, either `yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss'Z'` or `yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss'TZD'`.

total_sent_messages.description: The total number of sent messages.

total_received_messages.description: The total number of received messages.

total_sent_files.description: The total number of sent files.

total_received_files.description: The total number of received files.

404.description:
**HTTP Status Code:** `404`
Not Found **Error Code:** `2901`
Engagement does not exist: $engagementId.
**Error Code:** `1001`
User does not exist: $userId.

429.description:
**HTTP Status Code:** `429`
Too Many Requests. For more information, see [rate limits](/docs/api/rest/rate-limits/).

get.description:
Return a list of voice call engagement logs. Engagement data is available via API once it is completed. **Note** These fields - `agents.user_ip_address`, `agents.user_device_mac_address`, `agents.user_registered_sip_zone`, `agents.sip_zone_ip_address`, `sbcInfos.session_border_controller_name`, `sbcInfos.session_border_controller_ip_address`, `sbcInfos.consumer_zoom_trunk_name` and `sbcInfos.consumer_sbc_ip_address` - are only available to accounts which have enabled an internal flag to return these additional fields. To enable the feature flag, contact Zoom Support.

**[Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `contact_center_voice_call:master`

**[Granular Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `contact_center:read:voice_call_log:master`

**[Rate Limit Label](https://marketplace.zoom.us/docs/api-reference/rate-limits#rate-limits):** `HEAVY`

parameters.name: from
parameters.description:
The start time and date in either `yyyy-MM-dd`, `yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss'Z'`, or `yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss±HH:mm` format. The defined date range should be a month, as the response only includes one month's worth of data. If no start date is specified, return data from the past 24 hours.

**Note** When using `yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss'Z'` format, the `'Z'` is treated as a literal character. The timezone offset from `yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss±HH:mm` format is used for response datetime formatting.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: **Required** only when the `from` parameter is specified. The end time and date in `yyyy-MM-dd`, `yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss'Z'`, or `yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss±HH:mm` format, matching the format of the `from` parameter.

parameters.name: types
parameters.description: The call's type.

parameters.name: distribution
parameters.description: The engagement's distribution.

parameters.name: consumer_number
parameters.description: The consumer's phone number.

parameters.name: direction
parameters.description: The engagement's direction.

parameters.name: user_ids
parameters.description: A comma-separated list of agents' user IDs to query, up to 20 agent IDs.

parameters.name: engagement_id
parameters.description: The engagement's ID.

parameters.name: queue_ids
parameters.description: A comma-separated list of queue IDs to query, up to 20 queue IDs. If user provide `none`, filter by **No queue used** in the web UI.

parameters.name: cc_queue_ids
parameters.description: A comma-separated list of Contact Center queue IDs to query, up to 20 queue IDs. If a user provides `none`, filter by **No queue used** in the web UI.

parameters.name: country_iso_codes
parameters.description: Two-letter ISO country [code](/docs/api/references/abbreviations/#countries).

parameters.name: number_types
parameters.description: The number's type.

parameters.name: region_ids
parameters.description: A comma-separated list of region IDs to query, up to 20 region IDs.

parameters.name: region_names
parameters.description: A comma-separated list of region names to query, up to 20 region Names.

parameters.name: team_ids
parameters.description: A comma-separated list of team IDs to query, up to 20 team IDs.

parameters.name: team_names
parameters.description: A comma-separated list of team names to query, up to 20 team names.

parameters.name: sub_types
parameters.description:
A comma-separated list of detailed call leg types.
**Allowed subtypes**
* `external_warm_conference_call`
* `external_direct_conference_call`
* `external_warm_transfer_call`
* `external_direct_transfer_call`
* `internal_warm_conference_call`
* `internal_direct_conference_call`
* `internal_warm_transfer_call`
* `internal_direct_transfer_call`
* `flow_initiated_outgoing_call` - flow outgoing

parameters.name: view_type
parameters.description:
By default, this API returns the summary in List voice logs.
If `detail` is selected, it returns all the call logs' additional details.

parameters.name: next_page_token
parameters.description: Use the next page token to paginate through large result sets. A next page token is returned whenever the set of available results exceeds the current page size. This token's expiration period is 15 minutes.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: The number of items returned per page.

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the account.

next_page_token.description: Use the next page token to paginate through large result sets. A next page token is returned whenever the set of available results exceeds the current page size. This token's expiration period is 15 minutes.

page_size.description: The number of records returned within a single API call.

total_records.description: The total number of all the records available across pages.

from.description: The start time and date in ISO 8601 format, either `yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss'Z'` or `yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss'TZD'`. The defined date range should be a month, as the response only includes one month's worth of data. If no start date is specified, return data from the past 24 hours.

to.description: **Required** only when the `from` parameter is specified. The end time and date in ISO 8601 format, either `yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss'Z'` or `yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss'TZD'`, the same format as the `from` parameter.

call_legs.description: The direction of the engagement call leg. `inbound` | `outbound`.

sub_types.description: Specifies the detailed call leg type, such as a transfer or conference call.

start_time.description: The date and time when the engagement started in `yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss±HH:mm` format. The timezone offset matches the offset provided in the `from` input parameter, or defaults to UTC (+00:00) if no offset was provided.

end_time.description: The date and time when the engagement ended, in `yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss±HH:mm` format. The timezone offset is derived from the `from` input parameter if it includes a timezone offset (e.g., `-08:00`), otherwise it defaults to `+00:00` (UTC).

total_duration.description: The engagement's total duration, in seconds.

user_ip_address.description: IP address of the agent's device.

user_device_mac_address.description: MAC address of the agent's device.

user_registered_sip_zone.description: The SIP zone where the agent registered.

recorded.description: Flag to determine whether to recorded.

monitored.description: Flag to determine whether to monitored.

inbox.description: Flag to determine whether a message is in the box.

rates.description: The price for each sent message.

session_border_controller_list.description: Information about the session border controllers (SBCs) involved in the call.

consumer_zoom_trunk_name.description: The name of the trunk between the customer SBC and Zoom SBC.

items.description: Information about the session border controller.

call_leg.description: The direction of the engagement call log.

start_time.description: The date and time when the call started, in ISO 8601 format, either `yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss'Z'` or `yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss'TZD'`.

end_time.description: The date and time when the call ended, in ISO 8601 format, either `yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss'Z'` or `yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss'TZD'`.

total_duration.description: The call log's total duration, in seconds.

user_registered_sip_zone.description: The SIP zone where the agent registered.

inbox.description: Whether a message is in the box.

400.description:
**HTTP Status Code:** `400`
Bad Request **Error Code:** `300`
The time and date must be in `yyyy-mm-dd`` or ISO 8601 format, either `yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss'Z'` or `yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss'TZD'`.
**Error Code:** `300`
The requested report exceeds the 1-month limit.
**Error Code:** `300`
Invalid field.

404.description:
**HTTP Status Code:** `404`
Not Found **Error Code:** `1001`
User does not exist: {userId}.
**Error Code:** `1201`
Queue does not exist: {queueId}.

429.description:
**HTTP Status Code:** `429`
Too Many Requests. For more information, see [rate limits](/docs/api/rate-limits/).
